_comment: Cline (formerly Claude Dev) — VS Code AI coding agent. VS Code settings.json snippet.
_instructions: 2. Open VS Code Settings (Cmd+,) → click '{}' (Open Settings JSON)
3. Merge the cline settings below into your settings.json
4. In the Cline sidebar, select 'OpenAI Compatible' as provider
_note: Switch model to 'gpt-4o' to force cloud, or 'llama3.2' to force local via model-name routing rule.
